name: rise-video
paperTitle: RISE-Video: Can Video Generators Decode Implicit World Rules?
content:
## Introduction

Generating correct future frames requires understanding implicit world rules; model learns these for better planning. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept
